rationale: Re-verified at 77d8a1a9 under the falsifiability lens. All 12 named test functions (TestApproveImpl_OrphanRefuses, _OrphanInfraErrorFailsClosed, _BranchProbeErrorFailsClosed, _OrphanExemptions, _HatchDoesNotBypassOrphan, _AdvisorySlotNaming, _ObligationBackstop, _CorruptPlanRefuses, _PassesAfterOrphanSettled, TestPendingObligationPredicate, TestCompleteRun_RegatesAlreadyClosedOrphan, TestScanOrphanedClosedBeads_ErrorPreserving) are ABSENT — every grep -q existence discriminator exits 1, so each AC1-AC7 proof genuinely fails today. AC4 anchor ScanOrphanedClosedBeads: 0 code hits repo-wide; BranchExistsE: 0 hits (new seam). AC8: exactly 1 'rule as CompleteBead' hit at mindspec_executor.go:398 (single-line matchable); diff-vs-main grep is 0 today = RED. AC9: 'impl approve' 0 hits in ADR-0037; 'closed without' 0 hits in all three skill files. AC10 whole-set exactly-one invariant holds (workflow only, disclosed as a pin, four domains enumerated). h4n5 persisted (grep -c == 1). AC7 cycle grounding verified empirically: internal/approve imports no internal/complete; complete.go:486 is comment-only. Grounding citations (gitops.go:95-100, orphans.go:40/:71-83/:95, complete.go:492-495/:576-579, impl_test.go:75/:299/:714) all accurate. Every AC discriminator is genuinely RED; all seven R2 items ADDRESSED.

findings.1_G2_branch_probe_fail_open: ADDRESSED — BranchExistsE(name)(bool,error) specified as a new seam beside the byte-unchanged BranchExists (verified: BranchExists at gitops.go:95-100 collapses errors to false; BranchExistsE has 0 hits today); the error-preserving core lists the branch probe as the 4th fail-closed leg, the gate refuses on it, the fail-open wrapper keeps swallowing it; AC1(b) gains TestApproveImpl_BranchProbeErrorFailsClosed (absent today = RED); internal/gitutil/** added to execution Impacted Domains and Scope.
findings.2_G3_non_discriminating_proofs: ADDRESSED — every AC1-AC7 proof now chains a grep -q 'func Test<Name>' existence discriminator with the exact-named go test -run; verified all 12 named tests are absent at 77d8a1a9, so every proof is genuinely RED; AC4 re-anchored on ScanOrphanedClosedBeads (0 code hits repo-wide, 0 in impl_test.go).
findings.3_G3_AC7_import_cycle: ADDRESSED — AC7 split into (a) TestCompleteRun_RegatesAlreadyClosedOrphan package-local in internal/complete and (b) TestApproveImpl_PassesAfterOrphanSettled in internal/approve; cycle grounding verified empirically (approve imports no complete; complete.go:486 mentions approve in a comment only; R3 adds approve→complete, so the split is genuinely required); existence checks on both.
findings.4_G3_branchless_recovery_untruthful: ADDRESSED — R3 and ADR-0035 touchpoint now give the branch-less refusal a DISTINCT recourse naming the restoration prerequisite (restore bead/<id> ref then mindspec complete <bead>, or settle out-of-band), never a bare command that dies at the step-3.5 merge-base (complete.go:492-495 verified); AC6(a) asserts the prerequisite as a falsifier; branchless reconciliation stays deferred to mindspec-h4n5.
findings.6_G3_AC10_exactly_one_claimant: ADDRESSED — AC10 upgraded to a whole-set invariant: grep -l across .mindspec/domains/*/OWNERSHIP.yaml must equal exactly the single workflow path; verified it holds at 77d8a1a9 (workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml:9 claims internal/lifecycle/**; the other three domains have no claim). GREEN today by design and disclosed as the enforced regression pin of the round-1 discriminator — acceptable, since the claim itself landed with the round-1 revision.
findings.7_O3_cmd_overdeclared_and_execution_self: ADDRESSED — cmd/** dropped from the workflow declaration (the Impacted Domains workflow bullet no longer lists it; the next.go:459 citation is explicitly marked descriptive); the execution self-ownership gap is evidence-refuted as a pre-existing gap not introduced by 115, with 115 making no edit to the execution OWNERSHIP file.
